degraded.detail: Full shared/tests/ run: 2822 passed, 24 skipped, 1 FAILED (test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact.py::test_arch_impact_drops_found_at_all). Pre-existing + environmental, NOT introduced by this diff: the main-repo .shipwright/agent_docs/decision-drops/ dir exists but is empty (drops aggregated/cleared at the v0.24.0 release d5764ab7), so that test's 'dir present but no arch-impact drops' sanity guard fires. This diff touches only triage_gc.py + test_triage_gc.py — neither decision-drops nor architecture.md. Robustness gap (test skips when dir absent but not when empty) noted in F3a reflection.

surface_verification.justification: Pure Python maintenance-tool classifier change (one frozenset token + unit test); no startable user surface, no API/store/UI consumer affected. Backend-affects-Frontend rule N/A — triage_gc is an offline compaction CLI.

behaviors.behavior: A complianceBacklog dismissal with reason=complianceRefreshed is classified as machine-churn and dropped by plan_gc
behaviors.evidence: shared/tests/test_triage_gc.py::test_compliance_refreshed_machine_churn_dropped asserts 'refreshed' in drop_ids; born-red without the fix (refreshed was the 'Extra item' not dropped), PASSED after adding the token

behaviors.behavior: A complianceBacklog dismissal with reason=complianceResolved is still dropped (no regression from the change)
behaviors.evidence: same test asserts 'resolved' in drop_ids; PASSED. Existing test_machine_reason coverage in the 14-test GC suite unaffected (14/14 PASSED)

behaviors.behavior: A human dismissal (by=user) that reuses reason=complianceRefreshed is KEPT, because the MACHINE_DISMISSERS gate is unchanged
behaviors.evidence: same test asserts the human item id is NOT in drop_ids; PASSED
